<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Elotuzumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Empliciti is indicated in combination with lenalidomide and dexamethasone for the treatment of multiple myeloma in adult patients who have received at least one prior therapy (see sections 4.2 and...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（98.6%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（98.0%）</li>
<li>lipoma of colon（76.3%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（76.1%）</li>
<li>colonic lymphangioma（75.7%）</li>
<li>colon leiomyoma（75.3%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（75.3%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（75.3%）</li>
<li>cecal disease（74.8%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of cecum（74.7%）</li>
<li>cavernous hemangioma of colon（73.9%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament adenocarcinoma（73.2%）</li>
<li>endocervical carcinoma（70.8%）</li>
<li>adenoid cystic carcinoma of the cervix uteri（70.6%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament serous adenocarcinoma（70.5%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（70.2%）</li>
<li>bronchial neoplasm (disease)（69.6%）</li>
<li>minimally invasive lung adenocarcinoma（69.0%）</li>
<li>signet ring cell variant cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（68.7%）</li>
<li>intestinal variant cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（68.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
